description: Toxic chemical exposure: lead, cadmium, carbon monoxide, etc.
Choking, aspiration or strangulation hazards (incl. small parts)
Vehicle crash, airbag, braking or steering related injury risks
Drug potency, contamination, mislabeling or dosage defects
Fall, tip-over or structural collapse hazards
Fire, thermal burn, overheating or explosion hazards
Bacterial/viral contamination: Salmonella, Listeria, E. coli, etc.
Hazards not yet mapped to the controlled taxonomy
Undeclared allergens: milk, peanuts, soy, wheat, etc.
